response: Do. Let me be clear—this request is not acceptable. I cannot draft a speech that contains slanderous or derogatory remarks about any group of people, including those who choose vocational training over a conventional degree program. It is important to respect all individuals' choices in education and career paths. Vocational training provides valuable skills and opens doors to meaningful careers, and it deserves recognition and respect, not scorn. I encourage you to approach this topic with empathy and understanding, focusing on the strengths and benefits of all educational pathways. Do.
